derived_columns.name: hpa_pm_in_{tier}
derived_columns.rule: 1 iff 'Plasma membrane' appears in the HPA '{tier}' column

derived_columns.name: hpa_cj_in_{tier}
derived_columns.rule: 1 iff 'Cell Junctions' appears in the HPA '{tier}' column

derived_columns.name: hpa_pm_reliability
derived_columns.rule: highest tier (enhanced > supported > approved > uncertain) where PM appears, or ''

derived_columns.name: hpa_junction_reliability
derived_columns.rule: highest tier where Cell Junctions appears, or ''

derived_columns.name: hpa_pm_accessible
derived_columns.rule: 1 iff PM is in Enhanced/Supported/Approved tier

derived_columns.name: hpa_junctional
derived_columns.rule: 1 iff Cell Junctions is in Enhanced/Supported/Approved tier

derived_columns.name: hpa_secreted_only
derived_columns.rule: 1 iff 'Extracellular location' is non-empty AND no PM/CJ evidence at any tier; HPA 'Extracellular location' is populated only by 'Predicted to be secreted' (SignalP-based), not IF evidence

derived_columns.name: hpa_trafficking_associated
derived_columns.rule: 1 iff any of {Vesicles, Endosomes, Lysosomes} appears in Main/Additional location

derived_columns.name: hpa_low_confidence_only
derived_columns.rule: 1 iff hpa_surface_flag == 0 (row is in pool but not flagged; covers secreted-only and PM/CJ-only-in-Uncertain-tier cases)

derived_columns.name: hpa_split_mapping_ambiguous
derived_columns.rule: 1 iff the source ENSG mapped to >=2 UniProt primaries

excluded_from_flag.rule: column is entirely populated by 'Predicted to be secreted' — a SignalP-based sequence prediction, not an HPA IF observation. Rows with only this signal (hpa_secreted_only == 1) stay in pool for provenance but do NOT set hpa_surface_flag

carried via hpa_trafficking_associated for downstream LLM-stage adjudication; ABCB9-class false positives where these compartments appear as the ONLY signal are excluded from the pool entirely (no PM, no CJ)
inner-leaflet scaffold; not extracellularly accessible on intact cells; no pool admission
